title: Better Farming Right Click  + Right Click Harvest
description: (Client side) Input changes to farming to help speed up your intense farming exploits!
body:
# Quicker actions!
This mod adds 2 utilites so far:
## Seed and hoes have their cooldown removed
This helps when trying to use them over a large area since there wont be any gaps
![Hoe and Seed no cooldown](https://github.com/cakeGit/Better-Farming-Right-Click/blob/main/img/Faster%20Hoe%20and%20Seed%20Demo.gif?raw=true)
## Right click harvesting
Plain and simple, right click on a crop with its matching seed and it will harvest
![Right Click Harvest](https://github.com/cakeGit/Better-Farming-Right-Click/blob/main/img/Quick%20Farm%20Demo.gif?raw=true)

Note that this is a client mod intended for running on servers without the mod, however make sure that using utility mods like this (that change input beyond what is normally possible) is permitted.

P.S. Feel free to ask for a port to a modloader or minecraft version on the git!
